meta.objective: Turn every course home into an attractive marketing-style page that quickly explains why the learner should care and complete the course, with minimal instructional framing.

tasks.title: Turn course homes into compelling landing pages
tasks.objective: Make all five course homes attractive, concise, and motivation-led while preserving honest claims, navigation, and the course's editorial visual language.
acceptanceCriteria: Every course home leads with a course-specific reason to care and a clear start or continue action.
Readiness checks, prerequisite decisions, step-by-step orientation copy, inspectable traces, and audit-like source instructions are absent from the visible home flow.
Each home presents concise course-specific payoffs and an attractive preview of what learners will build.
Supporting provenance and evidence boundaries remain honest but visually secondary.
Desktop and narrow-screen browser QA, npm run lint, and npm test pass.
tasks.details: Refactor the shared HomeView and course hero metadata, update the home-page visual system and regression tests, verify all five course routes, and refresh reviewed page-grade evidence as required.
